hero.headline: Make Every Tea Break Richer with Strong, Fresh Assam Tea

testimonials.quote: A bold, refreshing cup with an aroma that makes morning tea special.
The loose tea brews beautifully and tastes fresh every time.
Strong flavor and excellent freshness in every cup.

products_page.headline: Our Products
products_page.intro: Black loose tea, flavored tea, tea masala, sugar, and bulk options from Assam Tea Company.
products_page.loose_tea_intro: Choose a tea category, then select the packet size that fits your need.

tea_categories.name: Regular

tea_categories.name: Regular Plus

tea_categories.name: Premium

tea_categories.name: Premium Plus
tea_categories.description: A stronger premium cup with deeper color and flavor.

tea_categories.name: Super Premium

special_products.name: Masala Tea Mix
